title: AI Tutor Workflow Overview
subtitle: Large-box primary variant baseline

contentBlocks.text: This slide verifies that the new large-box primary layout is rendered correctly in the v2 pipeline.

items.heading: Input
items.description: Collect learner context, level, and objectives.

items.heading: Reason
items.description: Assemble a concise explanation strategy for the concept.

items.heading: Deliver
items.description: Render visually clear teaching blocks with consistent hierarchy.

contentBlocks.text: Takeaway: large boxes should remain the visual primary with supporting text secondary.

accentImagePrompt: Simple abstract tutoring workflow illustration with clean geometry.

title: Foundational Concepts
subtitle: General intent/foundation case

contentBlocks.text: Use this slide to validate default foundation/overview behavior for general intents.

items.heading: Scope
items.description: Define what is included and what is intentionally out of scope.

items.heading: Language
items.description: Align wording with learner vocabulary and prior knowledge.

items.heading: Outcome
items.description: Set a practical objective that can be checked quickly.

accentImagePrompt: Minimal educational icon collage showing scope, language, and outcome.

items.heading: Concept
items.description: Introduce one core idea per card to reduce split attention.

items.heading: Example
items.description: Attach one concrete real-world case to each concept.

items.heading: Check
items.description: Ask one quick question to verify understanding.

contentBlocks.text: Supporting note: this paragraph uses the side-strip variant with a thin right accent line for quick contextual guidance.
This slide intentionally has no image prompt and blank image layout.

items.heading: Rule 1
items.description: Do not emit accentImagePrompt when image tier is none.

items.heading: Rule 2
items.description: Keep image_layout as blank to disable all image regions.

items.heading: Rule 3
items.description: Use structure and typography to maintain clarity.

title: Summary & Reinforcement
subtitle: General summarize mapping behavior

items.heading: Remember
items.description: Keep one primary structured block per non-title slide.

items.heading: Avoid
items.description: Do not combine intro and takeaway/callout on the same slide.

items.heading: Rotate
items.description: Vary composition styles to avoid repetitive 3-block patterns.

contentBlocks.text: Final takeaway: this gallery should let you visually inspect new v2 block behavior quickly.

accentImagePrompt: Subtle summary-themed illustration with checkmarks and arrows.

title: Process Mapping Control Slide
subtitle: Specialized variants still available

items.heading: Plan
items.description: Define objective and constraints before generation.

items.heading: Validate
items.description: Run compose, serialize, and render checks end-to-end.

contentBlocks.text: Control slide: processSteps is intentionally included to verify specialized mappings still render.

accentImagePrompt: Clean process flow diagram with three stages.
